verses.text: Joshua gathers all Israel to Shechem and rehearses God's acts. Shechem. He recounts grace.
Joshua gathers all Israel to Shechem and rehearses God's acts. Shechem. He recounts grace.
God called Abraham and gave him seed. Abraham. The story begins with grace.
God called Abraham and gave him seed. Abraham. The story begins with grace.
He brought them out of Egypt through the sea. Egypt. He redeemed them.
He brought them out of Egypt through the sea. Egypt. He redeemed them.
He brought them out of Egypt through the sea. Egypt. He redeemed them.
He gave victory over the Amorites and turned Balaam's curse. Victory. He fought for them.
He gave victory over the Amorites and turned Balaam's curse. Victory. He fought for them.
He gave victory over the Amorites and turned Balaam's curse. Victory. He fought for them.
He gave them a land they did not labour for. The land. All was God's gift.
He gave them a land they did not labour for. The land. All was God's gift.
He gave them a land they did not labour for. The land. All was God's gift.
'Choose you this day... but as for me and my house, we will serve the LORD.' Choose. Joshua sets the example.
'Choose you this day... but as for me and my house, we will serve the LORD.' Choose. Joshua sets the example.
The people vow to serve the LORD. Vowed. They confess His goodness.
The people vow to serve the LORD. Vowed. They confess His goodness.
The people vow to serve the LORD. Vowed. They confess His goodness.
Joshua warns they cannot serve God lightly. Warning. Holiness is no small thing.
Joshua warns they cannot serve God lightly. Warning. Holiness is no small thing.
They affirm again; he makes them witnesses against themselves. Witnesses. They bind themselves.
They affirm again; he makes them witnesses against themselves. Witnesses. They bind themselves.
They affirm again; he makes them witnesses against themselves. Witnesses. They bind themselves.
They affirm again; he makes them witnesses against themselves. Witnesses. They bind themselves.
He makes a covenant and sets up a stone of witness. The stone. A token of the vow.
He makes a covenant and sets up a stone of witness. The stone. A token of the vow.
He makes a covenant and sets up a stone of witness. The stone. A token of the vow.
He makes a covenant and sets up a stone of witness. The stone. A token of the vow.
Joshua dies at a hundred and ten; Israel serves God all his days. His death. A faithful leader passes.
Joshua dies at a hundred and ten; Israel serves God all his days. His death. A faithful leader passes.
Joshua dies at a hundred and ten; Israel serves God all his days. His death. A faithful leader passes.
Joseph's bones are buried; Eleazar dies. Buried. The old promises are fulfilled.
Joseph's bones are buried; Eleazar dies. Buried. The old promises are fulfilled.
